\tzpentry{ID4639}{Tunnel Quantum Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4639 introduces Tunnel Quantum Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\hat{\mathcal{H}}_{\text{tunnel}} = \hbar \omega_0 \hat{a}^\dagger \hat{a} + \frac{\hbar^2}{2m_{\text{eff}}} (\partial_d)^2 + V[d] + g_{\text{tunnel}} (\hat{a}^\dagger + \hat{a})(\partial_d + \partial_d^\dagger)$$
